name: Warranty registration
intro: Register your Hydrosonic device to extend its warranty to 3 years. You can see all your registered products below.

coverage.title: Warranty coverage —
coverage.body: The 2-year warranty is automatically activated with your proof of purchase. Register your product to extend it to 3 years.

dropzone.prompt: Drop your invoice here or click to upload (PDF, JPG or PNG)

field.serialFormat: Make sure the serial is correct (should be two capital letters followed by 5 digits).
field.dateFuture: Purchase date can't be in the future.
field.store: Enter the store where you purchased the device.
field.invoice: Attach your invoice as a PDF, JPG or PNG (max 10 MB).

error.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please reload the page and sign in again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

list.heading: Registered products
list.empty: You have no registered products yet.
